Class CookingStationState

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.cooking.station.CookingStationState
public class CookingStationState extends Object
Mutable runtime state for a single cooking station (furnace or campfire block).

All state is persisted to the block's PersistentDataContainer via CookingStationPdc whenever the station is closed or the tick loop detects a state change.

Slot layout (internal indices, not GUI slot indices):

  • 0–4 — ingredient slots
  • 5 — fuel slot
  • 6 — output slot

  • Method Details

    • getIngredient

      public org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack getIngredient(int index)
      Returns the item in the given ingredient slot.
      Parameters:
      index - 0–4
      Returns:
      the item, or null if the slot is empty

    • setIngredient

      public void setIngredient(int index, org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item)
      Sets the item in the given ingredient slot.
      Parameters:
      index - 0–4
      item - the item to place, or null to clear

    • ingredientSnapshot

      public org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack[] ingredientSnapshot()
      Returns a snapshot copy of all ingredient slots. Modifying the returned array does not affect this state.
      Returns:
      array of length INGREDIENT_COUNT

    • isEmpty

      public boolean isEmpty()
      Returns true if every ingredient slot, the fuel slot, and the output slot are all empty.

    • cookProgressFraction

      public double cookProgressFraction()
      Returns the fraction of cook progress as a value between 0.0 and 1.0. Returns 0.0 if no recipe is active.
